lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲੀਜੈ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਅਪਨੀ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਹੁ ॥੨॥੧॥੧੫੦॥
lines.translit: prabh sang mileejai ihu man deejai | naanak naam milai apanee deaa karahu |2|1|150|
lines.english: He is blended with God, by dedicating his mind to Him. Bless Nanak with Your Name, O Lord - please, shower Your Mercy upon him! ||2||1||150||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਰਾਮ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤੁਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਧੀਰਜੁ ਕੋ ਨ ਕਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mil raam piaare tum bin dheeraj ko na karai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Please, come to me, O Beloved Lord; without You, no one can comfort me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਏ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਮਰੇ ਦਰਸ ਬਿਨੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sinmrit saasatr bahu karam kamaae prabh tumare daras bin sukh naahee |1|
lines.english: One may read the Simritees and the Shaastras, and perform all sorts of religious rituals; and yet, without the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, God, there is no peace at all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਤ ਨੇਮ ਸੰਜਮ ਕਰਿ ਥਾਕੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਸਰਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੰਗਿ ਵਸੈ ॥੨॥੨॥੧੫੧॥
lines.translit: varat nem sanjam kar thaake naanak saadh saran prabh sang vasai |2|2|151|
lines.english: People have grown weary of observing fasts, vows and rigorous self-discipline; Nanak abides with God, in the Sanctuary of the Saints. ||2||2||151||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੧੫ ਪੜਤਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 ghar 15 parrataal |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Fifteenth House, Partaal:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਕਾਰ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਾਦਿ ਸੋਇਓ ਸੂਝ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: bikaar maaeaa maad soeo soojh boojh na aavai |
lines.english: He sleeps, intoxicated by corruption and Maya; he does not come to realize or understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਕਰਿ ਕੇਸ ਜਮਿ ਉਠਾਰਿਓ ਤਦ ਹੀ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pakar kes jam utthaario tad hee ghar jaavai |1|
lines.english: Seizing him by the hair, the Messenger of Death pulls him up; then, he comes to his senses. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਬਿਖੈ ਲਾਗੇ ਹਿਰਿ ਵਿਤ ਚਿਤ ਦੁਖਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: lobh bikhiaa bikhai laage hir vit chit dukhaahee |
lines.english: Those who are attached to the poison of greed and sin grab at the wealth of others; they only bring pain on themselves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਭੰਗੁਨਾ ਕੈ ਮਾਨਿ ਮਾਤੇ ਅਸੁਰ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khin bhangunaa kai maan maate asur jaaneh naahee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They are intoxicated by their pride in those things which shall be destroyed in an instant; those demons do not understand. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਪਟਿ ਬਾਜੀ ਹਾਰਿ ਮੂਕਾ ਪਛੁਤਾਇਓ ਮਨਿ ਭੋਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nipatt baajee haar mookaa pachhutaaeo man bhoraa |2|
lines.english: When the game of life is over, and he has lost, and he breathes his last, then the fool regrets and repents in his mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਜਨ ਪੁਕਾਰਹਿ ਸੁਨੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਡੋਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bed saasatr jan pukaareh sunai naahee ddoraa |
lines.english: The Vedas, the Shaastras and the holy men proclaim it, but the deaf do not hear it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਂਹ ਕਾਰਜਿ ਰਹੈ ਓਲੑਾ ਸੋਇ ਕਾਮੁ ਨ ਕਰਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jenh kaaraj rahai olaa soe kaam na kariaa |3|
lines.english: Those deeds which would have covered him - those deeds, he has not done. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਾਨੁ ਸਗਲ ਗੈਰ ਵਜਹਿ ਭਰਿਆ ਦੀਵਾਨ ਲੇਖੈ ਨ ਪਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ddaan sagal gair vajeh bhariaa deevaan lekhai na pariaa |
lines.english: He paid the fine, but it is in vain - in the Court of the Lord, his account is not credited.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੋ ਜਗੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਦਿਖਾਇਓ ਤਉ ਏਕ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aiso jag mohi gur dikhaaeo tau ek keerat gaaeaa |
lines.english: The Guru has shown me the world to be thus; I sing the Kirtan of the Praises of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨੁ ਤਾਨੁ ਤਜਿ ਸਿਆਨਪ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਇਆ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੫੨॥
lines.translit: maan taan taj siaanap saran naanak aaeaa |4|1|152|
lines.english: Renouncing his pride in strength and cleverness, Nanak has come to the Lord's Sanctuary. ||4||1||152||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਤ ਮਨਾਏ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਏ ਪੰਚ ਨਾਦ ਤੂਰ ਬਜਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadh sant manaae pria paae gun gaae panch naad toor bajaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and pleasing the Saints and holy men, obtain the Beloved Lord and sing His Glorious Praises; play the sound current of the Naad with the five instruments. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਪਾਰਿ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਨਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: baapaar govind naae |
lines.english: Dealing in the Name of the Lord of the Universe,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪਾਏ ਸਹਜਾਏ ਦਰਸਾਏ ਅਬ ਰਾਤਿਆ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਸਿਉ ॥
lines.translit: kirapaa paae sahajaae darasaae ab raatiaa govind siau |
lines.english: Obtaining His Mercy, I easily gained the Blessed Vision of His Darshan; now, I am imbued with the Love of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸੇਵਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨਾਥ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਲਨ ਲਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sant sev preet naath rang laalan laae |1|
lines.english: Serving the Saints, I feel love and affection for my Beloved Lord Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਮਨਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ਰਹਸਾਏ ਨਹੀ ਆਏ ਸਹਜਾਏ ਮਨਿ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur giaan man drirraae rahasaae nahee aae sahajaae man nidhaan paae |
lines.english: The Guru has implanted spiritual wisdom within my mind, and I rejoice that I shall not have to come back again. I have obtained celestial poise, and the treasure within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤਜੀ ਮਨੈ ਕੀ ਕਾਮ ਕਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh tajee manai kee kaam karaa |
lines.english: I have renounced all of the affairs of my mind's desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਰੁ ਚਿਰੁ ਚਿਰੁ ਚਿਰੁ ਭਇਆ ਮਨਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਪਿਆਸ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: chir chir chir chir bheaa man bahut piaas laagee |
lines.english: It has been so long, so long, so long, so very long, since my mind has felt such a great thirst.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੀਨ ਸਰਣਿ ਆਏ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਏ ॥੨॥੨॥੧੫੩॥
lines.translit: naanak deen saran aae gal laae |2|2|153|
lines.english: Nanak the meek has entered Your Sanctuary; please, take me in Your embrace. ||2||2||153||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨੋ ਦਿਖਾਵਹੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਤੁਮ ਬਤਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: har darasano dikhaavahu mohi tum bataavahu |
lines.english: Please, reveal to me the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, and show Yourself to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਊ ਬਿਖਮ ਗਾਰ ਤੋਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: koaoo bikham gaar torai |
lines.english: Who can destroy the fortress of sin,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਪਿਆਸ ਧੋਹ ਮੋਹ ਭਰਮ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਹੋਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aas piaas dhoh moh bharam hee te horai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and release me from hope, thirst, deception, attachment and doubt? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਲੋਭ ਮਾਨ ਇਹ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਛੋਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh maan ih biaadh chhorai |1|
lines.english: How can I escape the afflictions of sexual desire, anger, greed and pride? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਨਾਮ ਰੰਗਿ ਗੁਨ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: santasang naam rang gun govind gaavau |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, love the Naam, and sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭੀਤਿ ਜੀਤਿ ਮਿਟਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhram bheet jeet mittaavau |
lines.english: I have captured and demolished the walls of doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਧਿਆਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: anadino prabh dhiaavau |
lines.english: Night and day, meditate on God.

lines.translit: nidh naam naanak morai |2|3|154|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam is my only treasure. ||2||3||154||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਤਿਆਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh tiaag |
lines.english: Renounce sexual desire, anger and greed;

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਜਨ ਸਫਲ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har bhajan safal kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditation on the Lord is the only fruitful action. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: man simar gobind naam |
lines.english: remember the Name of the Lord of the Universe in your mind.
